Dashboard Archive: 2026-03-25 Home
About This Dashboard
What It Does
Long-term momentum ranker scoring 700+ tickers on returns from 1 month to 10 years, with relative performance vs SPY over 1y/5y/10y. Same scoring engine as the short-term ranker but optimized for longer investment horizons and secular trends.
Today's Reading
LINC dominates today's momentum ranking with a score of 95.2 and rank #1, displaying exceptional long-term performance with 1,440% returns over 10 years and outperforming SPY by 1,217% over the same period; all four moving average filters are passing, volatility is confirmed elevated, and the momentum signal is clean at 0.74. ISSC ranks second with a 273% one-year return that vastly outpaces SPY by 259%, though it shows a weaker foundation—the 30-day SMA fails the filter and the ratio_5y_1y metric at 1.07 suggests momentum has stalled after the 1-year mark. LINC's outperformance extends across all benchmark comparisons (QQQ and IAU), while ISSC's advantage narrows significantly in longer timeframes, indicating LINC represents more sustained secular momentum. The vol_ratio of 1.744 on LINC with a "confirmed" flag suggests price movement is backed by volatility expansion rather than narrow trading, a technical strength absent in the partial data shown for ISSC.
For educational and informational purposes only. Not financial advice. Past performance does not guarantee future results.

Click column headers to sort  |  Score = percentile composite: returns + ratio passes + bad-SPY resilience  |  SMA ✓ = price above all SMAs (30/50/100/200)  |  Ratio = short-term momentum consistency (out of 5 tests)  |  M = momentum signal (sortable) —  ● clean  ● stalling  ● overextended  |  V = volume confirmation (sortable) —  ● confirmed  ● normal  ○ thin  |  PB = entry timing: down day on strong stock (sortable by 1d return) —  ● buy today  ○ none  |  OL = theme overlap vs owned tickers —  ● overlap  ○ clear
